CustomField.description: Stores the 18-character Record Type ID used when NPPatch creates One-to-One Accounts. This is automatically set when you select a One-to-One Account Record Type in Settings. If blank, new One-to-One Accounts use the running user's default Account Record Type. Only relevant when using the One-to-One Account model.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Record Type ID for One-to-One Accounts. If blank, new One-to-One Accounts use the user's default Account Record Type.
CustomField.label: One-to-One Record Type
